description: Use the N/query module to create and run queries using the SuiteAnalytics Workbook query process. You can create multilevel joins, conditions using AND/OR/NOT logic, sort results, load and delete saved queries, view paged results, and run arbitrary SuiteQL queries.

methods.name: create
methods.description: Creates the query definition. This is the first step in creating a query with the N/query module.

params.name: options
params.description: Options object.

params.name: options.type
params.description: The query type to use. Use values from query.Type.

methods.name: createPeriod
methods.description: Creates a query.Period object that represents a period of time to use in query conditions.

params.name: options
params.description: Options object.

params.name: options.code
params.description: The period code. Use values from query.PeriodCode.

params.name: options.adjustment
params.description: The period adjustment. Use values from query.PeriodAdjustment.

params.name: options.type
params.description: The period type. Use values from query.PeriodType.

methods.name: createRelativeDate
methods.description: Creates a query.RelativeDate object that represents a date relative to the current date.

params.name: options
params.description: Options object.

params.name: options.dateId
params.description: The date ID. Use values from query.DateId.

params.name: options.value
params.description: The value of the relative date.

methods.name: delete
methods.description: Deletes an existing saved query that was created using the SuiteAnalytics Workbook UI.

params.name: options
params.description: Options object.

params.name: options.id
params.description: The ID of the query to delete.

methods.name: listTables
methods.description: Lists the table view objects that are included in a workbook in SuiteAnalytics Workbook.

methods.name: load
methods.description: Loads an existing saved query that was created using the SuiteAnalytics Workbook UI. The loaded query can be modified, joined, and executed.

params.name: options
params.description: Options object.

params.name: options.id
params.description: The ID of the query to load.

methods.name: load.promise
methods.description: Asynchronously loads an existing saved query that was created using the SuiteAnalytics Workbook UI.

params.name: options
params.description: Options object.

params.name: options.id
params.description: The ID of the query to load.

methods.name: runSuiteQL
methods.description: Runs an arbitrary SuiteQL query and returns the result set.

params.name: options
params.description: Options object.

params.name: options.query
params.description: The SuiteQL query string to execute.

params.name: options.params
params.description: Parameter values for the SuiteQL query.

methods.name: runSuiteQL.promise
methods.description: Asynchronously runs an arbitrary SuiteQL query.

params.name: options
params.description: Options object.

params.name: options.query
params.description: The SuiteQL query string to execute.

params.name: options.params
params.description: Parameter values for the SuiteQL query.

methods.name: runSuiteQLPaged
methods.description: Runs an arbitrary SuiteQL query as a paged query and returns paged results.

params.name: options
params.description: Options object.

params.name: options.query
params.description: The SuiteQL query string to execute.

params.name: options.params
params.description: Parameter values for the SuiteQL query.

params.name: options.pageSize
params.description: The number of results per page. Default is 50.

methods.name: runSuiteQLPaged.promise
methods.description: Asynchronously runs an arbitrary SuiteQL query as a paged query.

params.name: options
params.description: Options object.

params.name: options.query
params.description: The SuiteQL query string to execute.

params.name: options.params
params.description: Parameter values for the SuiteQL query.

params.name: options.pageSize
params.description: The number of results per page.

enums.name: Aggregate
enums.description: Holds the string values for aggregate functions supported with the N/query module.

members.name: COUNT_DISTINCT
members.description: Counts the number of distinct results.

enums.name: DateId
enums.description: Holds the string values for supported date codes in relative dates. Used to pass the dateId argument to query.createRelativeDate(options).

enums.name: FieldContext
enums.description: Holds the string values for the field context to use when creating a column. The field context determines how field values are displayed.

members.name: CONVERTED
members.description: Displays converted currency amounts using the exchange rate in effect on a specific date.

members.name: CURRENCY_CONSOLIDATED
members.description: Displays consolidated currency amounts in the base currency.

members.name: DISPLAY
members.description: Displays user-friendly field values (e.g. entity name instead of ID).

members.name: HIERARCHY
members.description: Displays user-friendly field values for hierarchical fields (e.g. 'Parent Company : SUB CAD').

members.name: HIERARCHY_IDENTIFIER
members.description: Displays raw field values for hierarchical fields (e.g. '1 : 5').

members.name: RAW
members.description: Displays raw field values (e.g. entity ID instead of name).

enums.name: Operator
enums.description: Holds the string values for operators supported with the N/query module. Used to pass the operator argument to Query.createCondition(options) and Component.createCondition(options).

members.name: ANY_OF
members.description: Matches any of the specified values.

members.name: ANY_OF_NOT
members.description: Does not match any of the specified values.

members.name: ENDWITH_NOT
members.description: Does not end with a string.

members.name: EQUAL_NOT
members.description: Does not equal a numeric value.

members.name: EXCLUDE_ALL
members.description: Excludes all of the specified multi-select values.

members.name: EXCLUDE_ANY
members.description: Excludes any of the specified multi-select values.

members.name: EXCLUDE_EXACTLY
members.description: Excludes exactly the specified multi-select values.

members.name: GREATER_NOT
members.description: Not greater than a numeric value.

members.name: GREATER_OR_EQUAL
members.description: Greater than or equal to a numeric value.

members.name: GREATER_OR_EQUAL_NOT
members.description: Not greater than or equal to a numeric value.

members.name: INCLUDE_ALL
members.description: Includes all of the specified multi-select values.

members.name: INCLUDE_ANY
members.description: Includes any of the specified multi-select values.

members.name: INCLUDE_EXACTLY
members.description: Includes exactly the specified multi-select values.

members.name: LESS_NOT
members.description: Not less than a numeric value.

members.name: LESS_OR_EQUAL
members.description: Less than or equal to a numeric value.

members.name: LESS_OR_EQUAL_NOT
members.description: Not less than or equal to a numeric value.

members.name: ON_OR_AFTER_NOT
members.description: Not on or after a date.

members.name: ON_OR_BEFORE_NOT
members.description: Not on or before a date.

members.name: START_WITH_NOT
members.description: Does not start with a string.

enums.name: PeriodAdjustment
enums.description: Holds the string values for adjustment types for a period. Used to pass the adjustment argument to query.createPeriod(options).

enums.name: PeriodCode
enums.description: Holds the string values for period codes for a period. Used to pass the code argument to query.createPeriod(options).

members.name: FIRST_FISCAL_QUARTER_THIS_FY

members.name: FOURTH_FISCAL_QUARTER_THIS_FY

members.name: LAST_FISCAL_QUARTER_ONE_FISCAL_YEAR_AGO

members.description: Last period one fiscal quarter ago.

members.name: LAST_PERIOD_ONE_FISCAL_YEAR_AGO

members.name: SAME_FISCAL_QUARTER_LAST_FY
members.description: Same fiscal quarter last fiscal year.

members.name: SAME_FISCAL_QUARTER_LAST_FY_TO_PERIOD

members.name: SECOND_FISCAL_QUARTER_LAST_FY

members.name: SECOND_FISCAL_QUARTER_THIS_FY
members.description: Second fiscal quarter of this fiscal year.

members.name: THIRD_FISCAL_QUARTER_THIS_FY
members.description: Third fiscal quarter of this fiscal year.

enums.name: PeriodType
enums.description: Holds the string values for period types. Used to pass the type argument to query.createPeriod(options).

enums.name: RelativeDateRange
enums.description: Holds query.RelativeDate object values for supported date ranges in relative dates. Used to pass the values argument to Query.createCondition(options) and Component.createCondition(options).

members.description: Same day fiscal quarter before last.

members.name: SAME_DAY_FISCAL_YEAR_BEFORE_LAST

members.description: Same fiscal half last fiscal year.

members.name: SAME_FISCAL_HALF_LAST_FISCAL_YEAR_TO_DATE
members.description: Same fiscal half last fiscal year to date.

members.name: SAME_FISCAL_QUARTER_FISCAL_YEAR_BEFORE_LAST

members.description: Same fiscal quarter last fiscal year.

members.description: Same fiscal quarter last fiscal year to date.

members.name: TODAY_TO_END_OF_THIS_MONTH
members.description: Today to end of this month.

enums.name: ReturnType
enums.description: Holds the string values for formula return types supported with the N/query module.

enums.name: SortLocale
enums.description: Holds the string values for sort locales supported with the N/query module. Used to pass the locale argument to Query.createSort(options) and Component.createSort(options).

enums.name: Type
enums.description: Holds the string values for supported query types used in the query definition. Used to pass the initial query type argument to query.create(options). Use the Records Catalog to find available record types and field IDs.

objectTypes.name: Query
objectTypes.description: The query definition. Use query.create(options) or query.load(options) to create this object.

methods.name: and
methods.description: Creates a new condition that corresponds to a logical conjunction (AND) of the arguments. Arguments must be query.Condition objects.

params.name: conditions
params.description: One or more query.Condition objects.

methods.name: autoJoin
methods.description: Creates a join relationship. Selects the correct join type automatically based on the record types being joined.

params.name: options
params.description: Options object.

params.name: options.fieldId
params.description: The column type (field ID) that represents the join.

methods.name: createColumn
methods.description: Creates a query result column based on the query.Query object.

params.name: options
params.description: Options object.

params.name: options.fieldId
params.description: The field ID for the column.

params.name: options.formula
params.description: A formula to use for the column.

params.name: options.type
params.description: The return type of the formula. Use values from query.ReturnType.

params.name: options.aggregate
params.description: The aggregate function. Use values from query.Aggregate.

params.name: options.groupBy
params.description: Whether to group by this column.

params.name: options.context
params.description: The field context. Use values from query.FieldContext.

params.name: options.alias
params.description: An alias for the column used in mapped results.

methods.name: createCondition
methods.description: Creates a condition (filter) based on the query.Query object.

params.name: options
params.description: Options object.

params.name: options.fieldId
params.description: The field ID for the condition.

params.name: options.operator
params.description: The operator. Use values from query.Operator.

params.name: options.values
params.description: Values to filter by.

params.name: options.formula
params.description: A formula for the condition.

params.name: options.type
params.description: The return type of the formula. Use values from query.ReturnType.

params.name: options.aggregate
params.description: The aggregate function. Use values from query.Aggregate.

params.name: options.children
params.description: Child conditions for compound conditions.

methods.name: createSort
methods.description: Creates a sort based on the query.Query object.

params.name: options
params.description: Options object.

params.name: options.column
params.description: The column to sort by.

params.name: options.ascending
params.description: Whether the sort direction is ascending.

params.name: options.caseSensitive
params.description: Whether the sort is case sensitive.

params.name: options.locale
params.description: The locale for the sort. Use values from query.SortLocale.

params.name: options.nullsLast
params.description: Whether nulls are listed last.

methods.name: join
methods.description: Creates a join relationship. Alias for Query.autoJoin(options).

params.name: options
params.description: Options object.

params.name: options.fieldId
params.description: The column type (field ID) that represents the join.

methods.name: joinFrom
methods.description: Creates an explicit directional join from another component to the root component (inverse join).

params.name: options
params.description: Options object.

params.name: options.fieldId
params.description: The column type (field ID) that represents the join.

params.name: options.source
params.description: The query type of the source component.

methods.name: joinTo
methods.description: Creates an explicit directional join to another component from this component (forward join).

params.name: options
params.description: Options object.

params.name: options.fieldId
params.description: The column type (field ID) that represents the join.

params.name: options.target
params.description: The query type of the target component.

methods.name: not
methods.description: Creates a new condition that corresponds to a logical negation (NOT) of the argument.

params.name: condition
params.description: The condition to negate.

methods.name: or
methods.description: Creates a new condition that corresponds to a logical disjunction (OR) of the arguments.

params.name: conditions
params.description: One or more query.Condition objects.

methods.name: run
methods.description: Executes the query and returns the query result set.

methods.name: run.promise
methods.description: Executes the query asynchronously and returns the query result set.

methods.name: runPaged
methods.description: Executes the query and returns a set of paged results.

params.name: options
params.description: Options object.

params.name: options.pageSize
params.description: The number of results per page.

methods.name: runPaged.promise
methods.description: Executes the query asynchronously and returns a set of paged results.

params.name: options
params.description: Options object.

params.name: options.pageSize
params.description: The number of results per page.

methods.name: toSuiteQL
methods.description: Converts this query.Query object to its corresponding SuiteQL representation.

properties.name: child
properties.description: A reference to children of the root component. Object of key-value pairs where keys are child component names.

properties.name: columns
properties.description: An array of query result columns returned from the query.

properties.name: condition
properties.description: The parent condition that narrows the query results.

properties.name: id
properties.description: The ID of the query definition. Only set for loaded queries.

properties.name: name
properties.description: The name of the query definition. Only set for loaded queries.

properties.name: root
properties.description: The root component of the query definition.

properties.name: sort
properties.description: An array of sort objects used for sorting query results.

properties.name: type
properties.description: The query type of the initial query definition.

objectTypes.name: Component
objectTypes.description: One component of the query definition. Encapsulates a record type in the query. The root component is created automatically; join components are created via autoJoin/join.

methods.name: autoJoin
methods.description: Creates a join relationship from this component. Selects the correct join type automatically.

params.name: options
params.description: Options object.

params.name: options.fieldId
params.description: The column type (field ID) that represents the join.

methods.name: createColumn
methods.description: Creates a query result column based on this component.

params.name: options
params.description: Options object.

params.name: options.fieldId
params.description: The field ID for the column.

params.name: options.formula
params.description: A formula to use for the column.

params.name: options.type
params.description: The return type of the formula.

params.name: options.aggregate
params.description: The aggregate function.

params.name: options.groupBy
params.description: Whether to group by this column.

params.name: options.context
params.description: The field context.

params.name: options.alias
params.description: An alias for the column.

methods.name: createCondition
methods.description: Creates a condition (filter) based on this component.

params.name: options
params.description: Options object.

params.name: options.fieldId
params.description: The field ID for the condition.

params.name: options.operator
params.description: The operator.

params.name: options.values
params.description: Values to filter by.

params.name: options.formula
params.description: A formula for the condition.

params.name: options.type
params.description: The return type of the formula.

params.name: options.aggregate
params.description: The aggregate function.

methods.name: createSort
methods.description: Creates a sort based on this component.

params.name: options
params.description: Options object.

params.name: options.column
params.description: The column to sort by.

params.name: options.ascending
params.description: Whether the sort direction is ascending.

params.name: options.caseSensitive
params.description: Whether the sort is case sensitive.

params.name: options.locale
params.description: The locale for the sort.

params.name: options.nullsLast
params.description: Whether nulls are listed last.

methods.name: join
methods.description: Creates a join relationship. Alias for Component.autoJoin(options).

params.name: options
params.description: Options object.

params.name: options.fieldId
params.description: The column type (field ID) that represents the join.

methods.name: joinFrom
methods.description: Creates an explicit directional join from another component to this component (inverse join).

params.name: options
params.description: Options object.

params.name: options.fieldId
params.description: The column type (field ID) that represents the join.

params.name: options.source
params.description: The query type of the source component.

methods.name: joinTo
methods.description: Creates an explicit directional join to another component from this component (forward join).

params.name: options
params.description: Options object.

params.name: options.fieldId
params.description: The column type (field ID) that represents the join.

params.name: options.target
params.description: The query type of the target component.

properties.name: child
properties.description: The child components. Object of key-value pairs where keys are child component names.

properties.name: parent
properties.description: The parent component.

properties.name: source
properties.description: The source query type (set by joinFrom).

properties.name: target
properties.description: The target query type (set by joinTo).

properties.name: type
properties.description: The query type of this component.

objectTypes.name: Column
objectTypes.description: A query result column. Use Query.createColumn(options) or Component.createColumn(options) to create.

properties.name: aggregate
properties.description: An aggregate function performed on the column values.

properties.name: alias
properties.description: An alias for the column used in mapped results.

properties.name: component
properties.description: Reference to the component this column belongs to.

properties.name: context
properties.description: The field context for values in this column.

properties.name: fieldId
properties.description: The field ID of this column.

properties.name: formula
properties.description: The formula used to create this column.

properties.name: groupBy
properties.description: Whether query results are grouped by this column.

properties.name: label
properties.description: The label for the column.

properties.name: type
properties.description: The return type of the formula used for this column.

objectTypes.name: Condition
objectTypes.description: A condition that narrows query results. Use Query.createCondition(options) or Component.createCondition(options) to create.

properties.name: aggregate
properties.description: An aggregate function performed on the condition.

properties.name: children
properties.description: Array of child conditions used to create this parent condition.

properties.name: component
properties.description: Reference to the component this condition belongs to.

properties.name: fieldId
properties.description: The field ID used in the condition.

properties.name: formula
properties.description: The formula used to create the condition.

properties.name: operator
properties.description: The operator used to create the condition.

properties.name: type
properties.description: The return type of the formula used in the condition.

properties.name: values
properties.description: Value or array of values used by the operator.

objectTypes.name: Sort
objectTypes.description: A sort placed on a query result column. Use Query.createSort(options) or Component.createSort(options) to create.

properties.name: ascending
properties.description: Whether the sort direction is ascending.

properties.name: caseSensitive
properties.description: Whether the sort is case sensitive.

properties.name: column
properties.description: The column that results are sorted by.

properties.name: locale
properties.description: The locale used for the sort.

properties.name: nullsLast
properties.description: Whether null values are listed last.

objectTypes.name: ResultSet
objectTypes.description: The set of results returned by the query.

methods.name: asMappedResults
methods.description: Returns the query result set as an array of mapped results (objects with column names as keys).

methods.name: iterator
methods.description: Returns a standard SuiteScript 2.x iterator for iterating through results.

properties.name: columns
properties.description: An array of query result column references.

properties.name: results
properties.description: An array of query.Result objects.

properties.name: types
properties.description: An array of the return types for the results.

objectTypes.name: Result
objectTypes.description: A single row of the query result set.

methods.name: asMap
methods.description: Returns the query result as an object with columns mapped to result values.

methods.name: getValue
methods.description: Gets the value at a given index in Result.values.

params.name: options
params.description: Options object or column index.

params.name: options.index
params.description: The index of the value to return.

properties.name: values
properties.description: The result values for this row.

objectTypes.name: PagedData
objectTypes.description: A set of paged query results with information about the paged result set.

methods.name: fetch
methods.description: Retrieves a page from the paged query results.

params.name: options
params.description: Options object.

params.name: options.index
params.description: The index of the page to fetch.

methods.name: fetch.promise
methods.description: Asynchronously retrieves a page from the paged query results.

params.name: options
params.description: Options object.

params.name: options.index
params.description: The index of the page to fetch.

methods.name: iterator
methods.description: Returns a standard SuiteScript 2.x iterator for iterating through pages.

properties.name: count
properties.description: The total number of paged query results.

properties.name: pageRanges
properties.description: An array of page ranges for the paged results.

properties.name: pageSize
properties.description: The number of query result rows per page.

objectTypes.name: Page
objectTypes.description: One page of the paged query results.

properties.name: data
properties.description: The query results contained in this page.

properties.name: isFirst
properties.description: Whether this is the first page.

properties.name: isLast
properties.description: Whether this is the last page.

properties.name: pagedData
properties.description: The set of paged results this page is from.

properties.name: pageRange
properties.description: The range of results for this page.

objectTypes.name: PageRange
objectTypes.description: A range of pages from the paged query results.

properties.name: index
properties.description: The index for this page range.

properties.name: size
properties.description: The number of query result rows in this page range.

objectTypes.name: Period
objectTypes.description: A period of time to use in query conditions. Use query.createPeriod(options) to create.

properties.name: adjustment
properties.description: The adjustment of the period. Uses values from query.PeriodAdjustment.

properties.name: code
properties.description: The code of the period. Uses values from query.PeriodCode.

properties.name: type
properties.description: The type of the period. Uses values from query.PeriodType.

objectTypes.name: RelativeDate
objectTypes.description: A relative date to use in query conditions. Use query.createRelativeDate(options) to create.

properties.name: dateId
properties.description: The ID of the relative date.

properties.name: end
properties.description: The end point of the relative date.

properties.name: interval
properties.description: The interval of the relative date (from start to end).

properties.name: isRange
properties.description: Whether the relative date represents a range or a specific moment.

properties.name: start
properties.description: The start point of the relative date.

properties.name: value
properties.description: The value of the relative date.

objectTypes.name: SuiteQL
objectTypes.description: A SuiteQL query. Use Query.toSuiteQL() to create.

methods.name: run
methods.description: Runs the SuiteQL query and returns the results.

methods.name: runPaged
methods.description: Runs the SuiteQL query as a paged query and returns paged results.

params.name: options
params.description: Options object.

params.name: options.pageSize
params.description: The number of results per page.

properties.name: columns
properties.description: Describes the result columns to be returned from the query.

properties.name: params
properties.description: Contains the parameters for the query.

properties.name: query
properties.description: Holds the string representation of the query.

properties.name: type
properties.description: Describes the type of the query. Uses values from query.Type.
